report_id.description: The unique identifier for the report.

status.description: The current processing status of the report.

download_url.description: A temporary URL to download the report. Only present when status is SUCCEEDED.

report_type.description: The type of report that was generated.

created_at.description: When the report request was created.

completed_at.description: When the report generation was completed. Only present when status is SUCCEEDED.
